body:
## Wave 7 — Verification → Private Launch → First Revenue

Closes the big question: *is everything wired correctly, and is Dealix ready to privately launch and sell the first Command Sprint?* This wave adds a verification harness, the Command Sprint offer surface, the founder-led manual revenue machine, and the governance assets — then proves the gate.

**Result: readiness 100/100 · Private launch GO · Public launch NO-GO** (pre-existing P1 hygiene only).

### Private launch readiness
- Asset-readiness score **100/100** (`scripts/verify_dealix_launch_readiness.py`), bands: 70–84 Private Ready, 85–100 Public Limited.
- Full report: `reports/launch/private_launch_readiness.md` — all 10 readiness questions answered **Yes**, nothing blocking private launch.

### Verification results (`bash scripts/run_dealix_full_verification.sh`)
| Check | Result |
|-------|--------|
| Positioning + claim safety | ✅ PASS |
| CTA map | ✅ PASS |
| Module status | ✅ PASS |
| Growth assets | ✅ PASS |
| Launch readiness score | ✅ PASS |
| Frontend build | ✅ PASS |
| Frontend lint | ❌ FAIL (pre-existing drift) |
| env-check | ✅ PASS |
| Security smoke | ❌ FAIL (pre-existing test-fixture `sk_live_*` / `.env.*.example` findings) |
| prod-verify | ❌ FAIL (wraps security-smoke) |

The master runner **never hides failures** and **continues on error**. Full report committed at `reports/verification/dealix_full_verification_latest.md`.

### Website readiness
- New `landing/command-sprint.html`: 7-day Command Sprint, five deliverables (Revenue Map, Proof Register, Executive Command Brief, Next Action Board, Approval Register), claim-safe (registered in the forbidden-claims allowlist). Funnel: Home → Command Sprint → Start/Diagnostic.

### First revenue plan
- `reports/revenue/first_revenue_plan.md` — ICP, first-30 structure, shortlist rules, diagnostic/proposal/payment/workspace/proof/upsell flow. Manual, founder-approved, no guarantees.

### Outreach approval queue
- `data/revenue/outreach_queue.jsonl` + `reports/revenue/outreach_approval_queue.md`. **Nothing auto-sends**; a draft is `sent` only after `approved`. First safe Arabic message included.
- `data/growth/first_30_targets.csv` — structured seed (placeholders only, no PII; real prospect data stays gitignored).

### Customer workspace test
- `customers/_template/` (12 files) + `scripts/create_customer_workspace.py`. Verified it creates all 12 files (`00_intake.md` … `11_upsell_recommendation.md`); throwaway test workspace removed.

### Proof / governance readiness
- `docs/governance/CLAIMS_REGISTER.md` (approved claims + forbidden classes), `docs/governance/HUMAN_APPROVAL_POLICY.md` (draft-not-send boundary), `data/launch/module_status.json` (live vs planned — planned modules can't be presented as live).

### Blockers
- **None for private launch.**
- Public launch P1 (pre-existing, not introduced here): frontend lint drift; `security-smoke` flags test-fixture secrets and `.env.*.example` files. Tighten before any public surface ships.

### Founder checklist (start manual sends when all true)
- [x] readiness ≥ 70 (100/100)
- [x] no unsafe claims · [x] Command Sprint page/offer · [x] Start/Diagnostic path
- [x] Sales one-pager · [x] Diagnostic script · [x] Customer workspace tested
- [x] Proof Pack template · [x] Claims Register · [x] Human Approval Policy
- [x] first-30 targets file · [x] outreach approval queue
- [ ] Replace placeholder targets with 5 real companies (+ evidence/warm-intro), approve, then send 5 manually.

> The real test of Wave 7 is not file count — it's the first paid customer reaching a Proof Pack.

https://claude.ai/code/session_014ULgsQLYVraYbirfPdP3Pd

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_014ULgsQLYVraYbirfPdP3Pd)_

commits.messageBody:
Add the full Dealix launch-verification suite, the Command Sprint offer
surface, the founder-led revenue machine, and the governance assets needed
to manually sell and deliver the first paid Command Sprint.

Verification harness
- scripts/run_dealix_full_verification.sh: master runner; never hides a
  failure, continues on error, writes a single markdown report, and prints
  private/public launch verdicts.
- 5 dependency-free verifiers: positioning + claim safety (negation-aware,
  reuses the founder-curated allowlist), CTA map, module status, growth
  assets, launch-readiness scorer (0-100 with verdict bands).

Offer + funnel
- landing/command-sprint.html: 7-day Command Sprint with the five
  deliverables; claim-safe, registered in the forbidden-claims allowlist.

Customer delivery
- customers/_template/: 12-file Command Sprint workspace.
- scripts/create_customer_workspace.py: scaffolds a workspace from template.

Governance
- docs/governance/CLAIMS_REGISTER.md, HUMAN_APPROVAL_POLICY.md.
- data/launch/module_status.json: live vs planned source of truth.

Growth + revenue (manual, founder-approved)
- data/growth/first_30_targets.csv (placeholder seed, no PII).
- data/revenue/outreach_queue.jsonl + reports/revenue/outreach_approval_queue.md.
- scripts/founder_daily_command.py + reports/founder/daily_command.md.
- reports/launch/private_launch_readiness.md, reports/revenue/first_revenue_plan.md.

Result: readiness 100/100, Private launch GO, Public NO-GO (pre-existing P1
hygiene: lint drift, security-smoke test-fixture findings).

title: Wave 7: Verification → Private Launch → First Revenue
